english: Is organic food worth the extra cost in India?
hindi: भारत में ऑर्गेनिक खाद्य पदार्थ के लिए अतिरिक्त खर्च की कीमत है कि यह क्या है?

vietnamese: Liệu thực phẩm hữu cơ có đáng với chi phí cao hơn ở Ấn Độ?
correct_answer: Yes, as it reduces exposure to pesticides and promotes sustainable agriculture.
expected_failure: Limited data on consumer behavior and purchasing power in rural areas.
